overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit, wood-paneled house interior in a horror video game. The player moves through a cluttered living room with scattered papers and a fireplace, transitions through dark corridors, and reaches a small room with windows overlooking rocky terrain. The environment features realistic lighting and detailed traditional wooden architecture with a tense, atmospheric mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: wood-paneled study with fireplace and scattered debris

events.description: camera approaches window, increasing natural light illumination on the right side

agents.ego_description: slowly panning around the room, examining the fireplace mantel and scattered papers on the floor

entered.detail: ornate black metal chandelier hanging from the ceiling
green marble fireplace with dark wooden mantel and paneling
white papers strewn across the wooden floor near boxes
stacked cardboard moving boxes with tape
dark brown leather armchair near the window
tall window revealing green trees and foliage outside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit wood-paneled room featuring a central fireplace with green marble surround. Scattered papers and cardboard boxes litter the floor, suggesting a recent move or search. The camera pans around the space, revealing a leather armchair and tall windows showing greenery outside, with a chandelier hanging from the ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from living room to bedroom corridor

events.description: exits the main living room through a doorway into an adjacent hallway
enters a bedroom area with visible bed and nightstand furniture

agents.ego_description: moving through connecting doorways into darker adjacent rooms, passing wooden furniture

entered.detail: tall dark wood paneled wardrobe with vertical panels
bed with light-colored bedding and pillows
small wooden bedside table with items on top
wooden door frame leading to the next room

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the living room fireplace, passing through a wooden doorway into a transitional space with a large wardrobe. It continues into a bedroom area featuring a bed with light bedding and a nightstand, the lighting growing progressively darker as the player moves deeper into the house.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dark corridor with wall sconces

events.description: enters very dark narrow hallway with only wall sconces for illumination
approaches and opens a closed wooden door at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: cautiously navigating the dark corridor, approaching a closed door at the hallway's end

entered.detail: dark wood-paneled walls creating a confined passageway
ornamental wall-mounted light fixture with minimal glow
dark wooden door blocking the corridor end

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow, dark corridor with wood-paneled walls that create a claustrophobic atmosphere. A wall sconce provides minimal illumination as the camera moves forward toward a closed wooden door at the hallway's end, the environment growing progressively darker.

scene_state.functional_zone: small storage room with window overlooking rocky cliff

events.description: bright natural light floods the space as the camera faces the window
camera turns away from the window and moves back toward the corridor

agents.ego_description: examining the rocky exterior view through the window, then turning to exit the room

entered.detail: window revealing rocky cliff face and boulders outside
planks of wood and construction materials piled against the wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a small storage room where bright natural light streams through a window revealing a rocky cliff exterior. Stacked lumber sits against the wall. After briefly observing the view, the camera turns and begins moving back into the dark corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cluttered, dimly lit living room through a series of darkening interiors before ending in a bright, secluded storage space. It begins by panning across a wood-paneled room filled with scattered papers and cardboard boxes, centering on a green marble fireplace and a leather armchair. As the camera moves away from the hearth, it passes through a wooden doorway and a bedroom area with light bedding, with the ambient light growing progressively dimmer. The scene then shifts into a narrow, claustrophobic corridor where a single wall sconce provides minimal illumination before the camera reaches a closed door at the end of the hall. Finally, the movement opens into a small storage room where bright natural light streams through a window overlooking a rocky cliff, before the camera turns to retreat back into the darkness of the corridor.
